message:
Fix inference test failures by adding command_categories to default priors

The interpretation_examples tests were failing because:
1. Default priors lacked command_categories Dirichlet distributions
2. Without category-based evidence, zombie class's extreme boolean priors
   absorbed probability that should go to abandoned class

Changes:
- Add command_categories section to priors.default.json with proper
  Dirichlet alphas for all 13 categories across 4 classes
- Fix test semantics: stalled process should have low CPU (0.02), not
  high CPU (0.91) - high CPU indicates useful_bad, not abandoned

Closes: bd-35oy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
